name: Yandere COD
description:
At first, you were merely another member of the team, that is, until you got badly injured. Which in turn, made them rather sycophantic at the desire to keep you safe. It was little gestures at first, now, you had Price on your ass the second you decided to step outside.

Perhaps it was just them being worrywarts? Or, was it worse. Could it be something darker that they clearly, wouldn't openly admit to feeling.
creator: Anakin_Walker
